title: Software Developer for AI Training
description: Evaluated and optimized AI models through RLHF, focusing on code quality and adherence to production standards to ensure high-quality software outputs.
Validated 100+ high-complexity algorithmic and mathematical prompts per week, identifying edge cases and maintaining 90%+ precision in LLM reasoning.
Performed rigorous manual testing of AI responses to detect inconsistencies, logical errors, and deviations from expected technical requirements.

title: Software Developer - QA
description: Designed and implemented Python (Pandas) and SQL scripts to automate 90% of manual verification processes, drastically reducing human error and increasing scalability.
Managed 10+ projects in Jira, leading cross-functional follow-ups for incident resolution and performing root cause analysis in Agile environments (Scrum/Kanban).
Performed ongoing analysis and data validation to monitor system performance, ensuring that process optimizations met service quality standards.
Created automated reports for various teams with the aim of giving information visibility and improving KPIs / OKRs.
Utilized Tableau and Excel to track performance monitoring and service quality improvement, identifying areas for technical debt reduction.

title: Customer Experience Representative
description: Managed complex dispute resolutions, gaining deep insight into end-user pain points and common software failure scenarios.

Performed data-driven analysis using Microsoft Excel / Google Sheets and Tableau to improve service quality, focusing on proactive problem-solving and maintaining a +60% NPS during high-demand periods.
